summary: AC-P-7 is covered by the OpenNori 0.1.3 single-bin CLI implementation, self contract refresh, tests, and reviewable artifacts.
reviewability: Run npm run check, inspect package.json bin.opennori, run node ./bin/opennori.js in a fresh directory, inspect README and the public site quick start.
limitations: This verifies local implementation and staged site content; public npm and public site require publish/deploy before external users get this exact version.
